sentences.translation: Mislim da je smijeh lijek za dušu.
sentences.translationEn: I think that laughter is medicine for the soul.

sentences.translation: Dan bez smijeha je izgubljen dan.
sentences.translationEn: A day without laughter is a lost day.

sentences.arabic: أُحِبُّ أَنْ أَجْلِسَ مَعَ النَّاسِ الَّذِينَ يَجْلِبُونَ الْبَهْجَةَ.
sentences.translation: Volim sjediti s ljudima koji donose radost.
sentences.translationEn: I like to sit with people who bring joy.

sentences.arabic: الضَّحِكُ مَعَ الْأَصْدِقَاءِ يَجْعَلُ أَصْعَبَ الْأَيَّامِ أَخَفَّ.
sentences.translation: Smijeh s prijateljima čini i najteže dane lakšim.
sentences.translationEn: Laughing with friends makes the hardest days lighter.
